news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Corporate Culture Leaders Strategy

overview.description: The Harbor Ares Systematic High Yield ETF (SIHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of high-yield, USD-denominated corporate bonds selected based on a proprietary scientific method. SIHY was launched on Sep 14, 2021 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Corporate Culture Leaders Strategy
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. (“Harbor Capital”) today launched the Harbor Corporate Culture Leaders ETF (HAPY), which aims to capture the alpha generated by companies with t...
